apigateway.usageplankey.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey` resource associates an API key with a usage plan. This association determines which users the usage plan is applied to.

apigateway.usageplankey.KeyId.Description: The ID of the usage plan key.

apigateway.usageplankey.KeyType.Description: The type of usage plan key. Currently, the only valid key type is `API_KEY`.

apigateway.usageplankey.UsagePlanId.Description: The ID of the usage plan.
